artifact: Lists single-faced Artifact cards and their vintage legality status.
sql:
SELECT c.name, l.status
FROM cards AS c
JOIN legalities AS l
  ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE c.type = 'Artifact'
  AND c.side IS NULL
  AND l.format = 'vintage'
ORDER BY c.name, l.status;

raw_response.sql:
SELECT c.name, l.status
FROM cards AS c
JOIN legalities AS l
  ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE c.type = 'Artifact'
  AND c.side IS NULL
  AND l.format = 'vintage'
ORDER BY c.name, l.status;
